formdata.value:
Memory: A simple Spring Boot app often needs 256MB to 1GB of RAM just to start, whereas a Go or NestJS app might only need 50MB to 100MB.
Startup Time: Spring can take several seconds to "warm up". However, new technologies like Spring Native (using GraalVM) allow it to start in milliseconds, similar to Go.
